message:
Expand test coverage: fcp-async-core (+116), fcp-store repair/offline/symbol_store (+114)

fcp-async-core: 55→171 tests covering sync primitives, channel edge cases,
task abort/join, time/deadline, cancellation tokens, runtime Debug, and
AsyncError Display.

fcp-store: 281→395 tests covering repair controller lifecycle (queue,
priority, rate limiting, permits, stats), offline capability tracking
(access patterns, pre-staging, EWMA decay), and symbol store operations
(OTI roundtrip, multi-node distribution, quota boundaries).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
